title: SkyGrid Swarm: Corner-Free Drone Deployment
strategies: border-line baseline: activate one full unobstructed row (or column); always corner-free, size m
lexicographic greedy: scan pads in row-major order, activate each iff it completes no corner with the already-active set
seeded multi-restart randomized greedy: try many shuffled activation orders and keep the largest corner-free set found
priority-heuristic construction: rank pads by a learned/handcrafted priority and greedily accept under the corner-validity checker
